name: Cloud Controls Matrix
description: CCM v4.1 — current major release. 207 controls across 17 domains (expanded from v4.0's 197). Cross-framework mappings being re-pinned upstream as of 2026.
relationToCloudSecurity: Current flagship cloud-security controls framework. Used in current STAR Registry attestations and downstream CSA mapping work.
relationToAISecurity: Cloud-platform controls foundation; AI-specific controls in AICM.

license.notes: CSA publications are typically released under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0. Confirm specific document license on download page.

notes: Current CCM. Pending upstream cross-framework re-mapping.
